description_long: This is a rugged, high-ankle hiking boot with a predominantly beige and gray color scheme, featuring a robust construction suitable for outdoor and urban environments. The upper is made of a combination of synthetic fabric and leather, reinforced with rubber overlays around the toe, heel, and lower sides for added durability and protection. The boot has a padded collar and tongue for comfort, and a loop at the back for easy pulling on. The lacing system uses metal eyelets and hooks, with thick, round laces arranged in a standard criss-cross pattern. The outsole is thick and appears to be made of durable rubber, designed to provide traction on various surfaces. Visible branding is present on the side and back, indicating it is a Salomon product, and the boot shows signs of dirt and wear, suggesting it has been used outdoors.
description: A rugged, beige and gray high-ankle hiking boot with reinforced rubber overlays, padded collar, and criss-cross lacing, showing visible signs of outdoor use and Salomon branding.
description_view_0: Left side view showing the Salomon logo, reinforced toe and heel, and the full lacing system.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the padded collar, pull loop, and Salomon branding on the heel.
description_view_2: Right side view displaying the boot's profile, rubber overlays, and the lacing system from a different angle.
description_view_3: Front view focusing on the toe cap, criss-cross laces, and the boot's overall width and structure.
attribute_logo: White 'SALOMON' text logo on the outer side and back heel strap.
